backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining pharmacogenomic analysis types (Drug, RiskLabel, AnalysisResult) and functions for managing patient analysis data with VCF processing, including storage integration and CRUD operations for analysis results.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including animated backgrounds, intro animations, metric cards, logo enhancements, and UI improvements with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality, including components for analysis workflow, animations, metrics display, and chatbot interface.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes defining medical-themed color tokens, spacing, and design system values for consistent styling across the application.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MediSphere application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing intro animation state with localStorage persistence, rendering IntroAnimation or Layout with AnalysisPage, and providing ThemeProvider and Toaster for notifications.
Component fetching and displaying pharmacogenomic analysis results for multiple drugs with risk badges, metrics panel, accordion details, tabs, and report viewer, generating mock data when needed.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackgrou: Component rendering animated DNA helix and capsule graphics positioned across the screen with CSS animations for floating and drifting effects to create a dynamic biomedical background.
frontend/src/components/Chatbot.tsx: React component that renders an AI medical assistant chatbot interface with message display, input handling, and medical disclaimer. Uses useChatbot hook to manage messages and communicate with backend for patient-specific pharmacogenomic queries.
frontend/src/components/ChatMessage.tsx: Component rendering individual chat messages with role-based styling, displaying user messages right-aligned with User icon and assistant messages left-aligned with Bot icon.
frontend/src/components/DrugSelector.tsx: Drug selection component allowing users to add/remove drugs from a predefined list (codeine, warfarin, clopidogrel, simvastatin, azathioprine, fluorouracil) with tooltips showing drug descriptions. Manages selected drugs state and displays them as removable badges.
frontend/src/components/IntroAnimation.t: Animated splash screen component that displays the MediSphere logo with staged fade-in effects, DNA helix separator, and letter animations over 4 seconds. Includes skip button to bypass the intro sequence.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component providing header with logo/branding, animated background, main content area, and footer with attribution to caffeine.ai. Includes sticky header with GitHub link and medical disclaimer in footer.
frontend/src/components/MetricCard.tsx: Reusable metric display card component that shows analysis statistics with dynamic styling, icons, and colors based on metric type (confidence, risk, adjustment, severity). Supports percentage, count, and text formats with optional tooltips.
frontend/src/components/MetricsPanel.tsx: Dashboard panel component that aggregates and displays pharmacogenomic analysis metrics including average confidence, high-risk drug counts, dose adjustments, parsing success rates, and severity distributions across all analyzed drugs.
frontend/src/components/ReportViewer.tsx: React component that displays analysis results with options to view/copy JSON, download TXT, and generate PDF reports. Uses toast notifications and manages UI state for copy confirmation.
frontend/src/components/RiskBadge.tsx: React component that renders a color-coded badge with icon and tooltip for displaying pharmacogenetic risk levels (safe, adjust dosage, toxic, ineffective, unknown) along with confidence percentage.
frontend/src/components/VCFUploader.tsx: React component providing drag-and-drop and click-to-upload functionality for VCF files with validation (5MB limit, .vcf extension), progress tracking, and backend integration via actor. Handles file upload to the backend canister and triggers success callback with patient ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state. Automatically invalidates and refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useChatbot.ts: Custom React hook managing chatbot conversation state with simulated AI responses. Provides hardcoded responses to common pharmacogenetic questions about diplotypes, phenotypes, risk assessments, genes, and dosing.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication state. Wraps @dfinity/auth-client with React state management and provides typed context for identity access.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React hooks wrapping React Query for backend data operations including fetching analysis data, patient counts, drug statistics, and mutations for adding/simulating analysis data. All hooks depend on the actor from useActor and handle query invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom medical/biotech color palette (teal, cyan, deep blue) for light and dark modes, CSS custom properties for theming, and keyframe animations for fade-in, slide, pulse-glow, and floating effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up QueryClient for data fetching, wraps the app with InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AnalysisPage.tsx: Main analysis page component managing VCF upload, drug selection, and results display workflow with a hero section, step-by-step UI for uploading files and selecting drugs, and conditional rendering of analysis results and chatbot.
frontend/src/utils/reportGenerator.ts: Utility functions to generate downloadable TXT and PDF reports from AnalysisResult data, formatting patient information, risk assessment, pharmacogenomic profile, clinical recommendations, and medical disclaimers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with medical color palette using OKLCH color space, custom border radius, medical-themed box shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting MediSphere's architecture (FastAPI backend, MongoDB, LLM integration, React frontend), implemented features for VCF upload, drug selection, risk analysis display, chatbot, and report generation, plus deployment configuration.
